# AI Workshop — Free AI Course

> A free, beginner-friendly course on building and deploying web projects with Claude Code. No coding experience required. Go from zero to a live website in about 3 hours.

This is an open-source educational resource hosted at https://inosaint.github.io/ai-workshop/

## Course Overview

AI Workshop teaches complete beginners how to build web projects using Claude Code (Anthropic's AI coding assistant). The course covers:

- Setting up GitHub and Claude Code
- Building web projects with AI assistance (vibe coding)
- Testing projects locally
- Deploying to GitHub Pages for free
- Using the Claude API directly
- Adding analytics with PostHog

## Course Modules

### Start Here
- [Welcome & Introduction](https://inosaint.github.io/ai-workshop/introduction/): Overview of the course, who it's for, and what you'll learn
- [Your First AI Creation (Quick Win)](https://inosaint.github.io/ai-workshop/quick-win/): Experience AI-assisted creation in 60 seconds

### Setup
- [GitHub Account Setup](https://inosaint.github.io/ai-workshop/github-setup/): Create a GitHub account and install GitHub Desktop
- [Install Claude Code](https://inosaint.github.io/ai-workshop/install-claude-code/): Install Node.js and Claude Code

### Build Your Project
- [Choose Your Project](https://inosaint.github.io/ai-workshop/choose-project/): Pick a project idea and write a prompt for Claude
- [Building with Claude Code](https://inosaint.github.io/ai-workshop/building-with-claude/): Use Claude Code to generate your project
- [Testing Locally](https://inosaint.github.io/ai-workshop/testing-locally/): Run and test your project on your computer
- [Making Changes](https://inosaint.github.io/ai-workshop/making-changes/): Modify your project and save progress with Git

### Go Live
- [Deploy to GitHub Pages](https://inosaint.github.io/ai-workshop/deploy-github-pages/): Put your project live on the internet for free

### Level Up
- [Tips & Tricks](https://inosaint.github.io/ai-workshop/claude-tips/): Advanced techniques for working with Claude Code
- [Claude API Basics](https://inosaint.github.io/ai-workshop/claude-api/): Learn to use the Claude API directly in your projects
- [Add Analytics (PostHog)](https://inosaint.github.io/ai-workshop/analytics-posthog/): Track visitors with PostHog analytics

### Reference
- [Cheat Sheet](https://inosaint.github.io/ai-workshop/reference/cheat-sheet/): Quick reference for common commands
- [Glossary](https://inosaint.github.io/ai-workshop/reference/glossary/): Definitions of technical terms
- [Troubleshooting](https://inosaint.github.io/ai-workshop/troubleshooting/): Solutions to common problems

## Key Facts

- **Price**: Free and open source (MIT License)
- **Duration**: Approximately 3 hours
- **Prerequisites**: None — no coding experience required
- **Tools Used**: Claude Code, GitHub, GitHub Desktop, GitHub Pages
- **Source Code**: https://github.com/inosaint/ai-workshop
- **Built With**: Astro + Starlight
